name: CalPERS Supplement - Contracting Agencies' Benefits for Fiscal Years 2002-03 to 2023-24
description: This dataset compares selected benefits of all the local public agencies that contracted with CalPERS. Agencies are listed alphabetically and include the plan types (miscellaneous or safety) and a five-digit code used for identification by CalPERS of the various benefit formulas.

name: Funding Positions of CalPERS Contracting Agencies for Fiscal Years 2002-03 to 2023-24

columns.name: Category
columns.description: 1 = Miscellaneous Plan; 2 = Safety Plan; 3 = Safety Fire Plan; 4 = Safety Police/Sheriff Plan; 5 = Safety Lifeguard Plan; 6 = Miscellaneous Tier 2; 7 = Safety Tier 2; 8 = Miscellaneous Tier 3; 9 = Safety School Police

description: This dataset contains the Actuarial Liabilities, Actuarial Value of Assets, Unfunded Liabilities, and Funding Ratios for each Local Contracting Agency.
